markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, new initiatives, and product updates.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Reddit Strategy:** GrowthX will explore managing an official SchoolAI Reddit account to replace the canceled PSEO project, repurposing blog content and using GummySearch for social listening.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [**Product Launch:** The Chrome extension enters open beta next week, enabling SchoolAI to promote it actively on the website and in content.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Shift:** The company is moving from a single "2.0" launch to a continuous feature rollout, requiring content to be updated to reflect only currently available features.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [**New Content Pillar:** Jenn drafted titles for a new content pillar on professional development (PD) and implementation, aligning with a new sales strategy offering free product access via PD contracts.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)

## Topics

### Content & Editorial

  - [**Framer Backlog:** The staging queue is healthy (10+ articles). Jenn will flag Nikki if it drops below 10, ensuring coaches have a consistent review pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
  - [**Framer Bug Fix:** Drew fixed a bug that applied FAQs globally, enabling page-specific FAQ management.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [**Pillar 2 Content Draft:** Jenn drafted titles for the new PD/implementation pillar. Nikki will review them in Notion and add comments to guide content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [**November Traffic:** Down MoM, but this is typical for the first half of the month and expected to recover.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)

### Strategic Shift: PSEO → Reddit

  - [**PSEO Project Canceled:** The project was canceled due to contract end.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [**Reddit Initiative:** GrowthX will explore managing an official SchoolAI Reddit account.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
      - [**Goal:** Repurpose blog content and engage directly with teachers.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
      - [**Method:** Be transparent as SchoolAI to build trust and avoid penalties.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
      - [**Tooling:** Use GummySearch (paid for one year) for social listening.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Exploration begins now; formal contract work is a 2025 consideration.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)

### Product & Company Updates

  - [**"2.0" Launch Canceled:** The company is shifting to a continuous feature rollout.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The previous launch process was "a mess."](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [**Content Impact:** Must only promote currently available features.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [**Chrome Extension Open Beta:**](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
      - [**Status:** Enters open beta next week after a successful month-long closed beta.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
      - [**Action:** Jenn will update content to reflect the extension's current capabilities once it's live.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [**LLM Experiment:**](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
      - [**Status:** Too early to draw conclusions from the \~1-month-old experiment.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
      - [**Initial Read:** Performance appears stable, showing no significant positive or negative impact.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Nikki:** Get the "2.0" strategy slides and recording from Tucker for Jenn.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
  - [**Nikki:** Review Pillar 2 content titles in Notion and add comments.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [**Nikki:** Notify Jenn when the Chrome extension is live in open beta.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [**Jenn:** Update Airtable with new content and FAQs.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [**Jenn:** Monitor the Framer backlog and flag Nikki if it drops below 10.](https://fathom.video/share/Njj5fMx6JwKDk1UwTB25WPUdRrakUTiu?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
